items.title: Pitchfork Paris 2026 Announces First Wave of Artists

items.title: Julia Jacklin Signs to 4AD, Lines Up 2026 and 2027 Tour Dates
items.summary: The Australian artist will play shows across North America this fall, then head to Europe and the UK in February of next year
